characterDirection.positiveConstraint: R7 casting variety lock: treat the 10-image batch as a real offshore-wind workforce ensemble, not one attractive young female lead copied into different PPE and backgrounds. Each prompt must explicitly lock a distinct adult casting category: adult man / clearly masculine adult professional, androgynous adult professional, or adult woman with a non-repeated face. Character identity must be decided before costume/background: vary apparent age decade, facial architecture, eye/nose/mouth/jaw proportions, cheek mass, neck and shoulder proportion, skin tone, hairline/hairstyle, height impression, body build, posture line, action silhouette, expression, camera angle, hand gesture, and tool interaction. At least half of each 10-image batch should have non-glamour task poses such as crouching, leaning into wind, stepping from vessel to platform, reading a permit, fastening a harness, calibrating equipment, or carrying a heavy case. For masculine slots, render an adult man or clearly masculine adult worker, not a pretty young woman, tomboy heroine, soft idol face, or feminine face under masculine clothing. For androgynous slots, render a genuinely androgynous adult worker with mixed facial/body cues, not a default feminine anime face. For feminine slots, keep the worker professional and visually appealing but avoid repeated waifu, idol heroine, doll-face, same cute girl, and same front-facing beauty pose.
characterDirection.negativePrompt: all-female cast, same cute girl, same beautiful young woman, waifu, bishoujo heroine, idol heroine, anime idol face, generic anime girl, default pretty heroine, repeated female protagonist, copy of previous heroine, identical pretty face with different PPE, only outfit changed, only background changed, glamour model pose, beauty portrait pose, fashion catalogue pose, pin-up stance, repeated smile, repeated calm cute expression, tomboy girl replacing adult man, feminine face in masculine slot, feminine face in androgynous slot, soft idol face in masculine slot, soft waifu face in androgynous slot, same face, repeated face template, identical anime heroine face, doll face, copy-pasted face, identical facial proportions, same eye shape, same nose, same jawline, same mouth shape, identical hairstyle, identical body silhouette, identical neutral confident stance, repeated front-facing pose, repeated three-quarter pin-up pose, idol pin-up pose, fashion model pose, child, minor, teenage schoolgirl, school uniform, childlike body, infantilized face, sexualized character, revealing PPE, fashion outfit replacing safety equipment

batchDiversityPolicy.positiveConstraint: Each new 10-character batch must read as a crew of different adult professionals, not one model in different outfits. Across every batch, use unique diversity signatures and vary casting category, age impression, face construction, skin tone, hair, body silhouette, posture, expression, camera angle, hand gesture, and tool interaction. Repeating a slot profile across batches is invalid. Do not let the shared art style override the casting lock.
posePalette: leaning into sea wind while checking a strapped tablet
kneeling at an open deck equipment case
walking diagonally across wet grating with a heavy tool bag
half-turned while signaling to an unseen deck crew
bracing one boot on a low step beside a railing
squatting to connect a sensor cable near a junction box
standing side-on while reading a laminated work permit
reaching upward to inspect a safety line carabiner
turning away from the camera while looking back over shoulder
wide balanced stance while holding a torque tool across the body
seated on a service crate while calibrating a handheld instrument
one hand gripping rail, the other pointing toward turbine nacelle
low crouch beside coiled cable and portable analyzer
stepping from vessel gangway onto turbine platform
arms close to body while shielding a radio from spray
profile stance with clipboard tucked under one arm
qaChecklist: Confirm the batch is not all female-presenting and no more than four are feminine-presenting.
Confirm at least four characters read as adult men or clearly masculine adult professionals.
Confirm androgynous slots do not collapse into default feminine anime faces.
Confirm masculine and androgynous slots do not look like the same pretty heroine with different PPE.
Confirm faces are not reused with only PPE or background changes.
Confirm at least five characters use non-glamour task poses instead of front-facing beauty poses.
Confirm no diversityProfile signature is repeated across pending batches.
Confirm at least eight age impressions and at least three mature adult age impressions in each 10-image batch.
Confirm at least eight distinct pose silhouettes and at least six camera angles within each 10-image batch.
Confirm hairstyle, expression, face shape, body type, hand gesture, and tool interaction vary across the batch.
Confirm every character remains an adult professional in credible PPE.

windTurbineGeometry.positiveConstraint: Engineering background accuracy is mandatory. Every visible offshore wind turbine must be a conventional modern three-bladed horizontal-axis wind turbine. Each complete rotor has exactly three smooth, tapered aerodynamic blades attached to one centered hub and evenly spaced 120 degrees apart. Blade curvature must remain continuous and structurally plausible, with consistent length, taper, perspective and attachment at the blade roots. The nacelle must sit correctly on one tower with a plausible offshore foundation and access platform. Keep rotors visually separated from the character and from other turbines. Prefer a few clearly readable turbines; if a rotor would be heavily occluded or cropped, omit that turbine rather than inventing partial geometry.
windTurbineGeometry.negativePrompt: two-bladed wind turbine, four-bladed wind turbine, five-bladed wind turbine, extra turbine blade, missing turbine blade, duplicate turbine blade, fused blades, branching blade, forked blade, partially formed rotor, asymmetric rotor, uneven blade spacing, off-center hub, detached blade, floating blade, broken blade, bent blade, kinked blade, warped blade, twisted blade, melted blade, rubber-like blade, inconsistent blade length, malformed blade root, blade passing through hub, blade intersecting nacelle, blade intersecting tower, blade intersecting platform, blade intersecting character, blades intersecting each other, overlapping turbines, malformed nacelle, duplicate nacelle, duplicated tower, split tower, leaning tower, floating turbine, impossible offshore foundation, impossible ladder, impossible access platform, inconsistent turbine scale, impossible perspective, turbine growing out of another structure

qaChecklist: Count each complete rotor: exactly three blades.
Confirm approximately 120-degree spacing and one centered hub.
Confirm smooth continuous blade geometry without kinks, forks, warping or duplicated roots.
Confirm no blade intersects the tower, nacelle, platform, character or another blade.
Confirm nacelle, tower, foundation, ladder and platform form one plausible offshore structure.
Confirm turbine scale and perspective are consistent across foreground and background.
